description: Composition:100% round neck t-shirt in dark grey with purple stripes and graphic printWash care:Machine wash separately in cold water. Use mild detergent. Do not bleach. Avoid soaking. Remove promptly. Line dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only. Do not iron directly on print/embroidery.Fitting:Slim FitThis round neck t-shirt from classic polo in dark grey with thin purple stripes and graphic print on the front is great for casual wear. Add this to a pair of denims and your set for an outing with friends or to make heads turn in college. A great addition to your wardrobe. Model statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-18"
